headline: Will Ingersoll (IR) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
summary: Ingersoll (IR) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

headline: Allegion Gears Up to Post Q2 Earnings: Is a Beat in the Offing?
summary: ALLE heads into Q2 results with revenue and earnings growth expected as acquisitions and international demand face cost and FX pressures.
